provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales and a prominent bony crest ridge running from brow to crown, heavy brow ridges over fierce amber slit-pupil eyes, lipless jaw with visible teeth set in a permanent scowl, barrel chest with aggressive forward lean, thick scarred tail raised showing confidence, wearing dark bronze chest plate and pauldrons shaped to follow natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks, crimson Drashan house sash at waist over cured dark leather underpadding, a heavy curved blade sheathed at the hip, small Drashan house badge riveted to the left shoulder plate

judgment.explanation: Alt seed Drashan warrior. Consistent forged bronze armor over scales.
